content: All Claude API calls are proxied through the Supabase Edge Function at supabase/functions/ai-proxy/index.ts. Client code in src/lib/claude.ts sends { type, payload } to the Edge Function URL. The Edge Function reads ANTHROPIC_KEY from Deno.env. Never expose the key client-side. Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 for all calls.

name: streaming-shot-advice
description: Shot advice uses ReadableStream: Edge Function streams via Anthropic SDK stream(), client reads with response.body.getReader(). The streamAIAdvice() function in src/lib/claude.ts calls an onChunk callback for each decoded text chunk. ShotLogger.tsx appends chunks to aiAdvice state, showing a blinking cursor while isStreaming is true.
